MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Arturo Sanchez is present.
Attorney Charles M. Collins appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jocelyn Ramirez is present.
Attorney Deepa Varma representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of FEB-06-2012 is vacated.
